title: M&T Bank Has More Commercial Real Estate Exposure Than Its Peers. How Is Credit Quality Holding Up?
text: M&T's commercial real estate exposure is close to 300% of core capital, which is the level of exposure that starts to attract attention from regulators. Credit quality is still holding up.

title: 2023 Q1 Earnings Season Off to a Promising Start
text: The 2023 Q1 earnings picture emerging at this early stage is one of resilience and stability, with an above-average proportion of companies beating estimates and providing a good-enough outlook in an uncertain macro environment.

title: 2023 Q1 Earnings Season Off to a Promising Start
text: The 2023 Q1 earnings picture emerging at this early stage is one of resilience and stability, with an above-average proportion of companies beating estimates and providing a good-enough outlook in an uncertain macro environment.

title: Factbox: Deposit flight from U.S. regional banks raise questions about funding costs
text: Regional banks in the United States on Monday reported deposit outflows between 3% and 11% from the prior quarter after customers sought the refuge of bigger banks in the aftermath of one of the worst banking crises.

title: Bank earnings ‘off to a good start,' with Bank of America and Goldman Sachs on deck
text: First-quarter earnings from the largest U.S. banks are off to a mostly positive beginning despite a tough start to the year for the sector, analysts at Jefferies said Monday.

title: M&T Bank (MTB) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher Revenues
text: Increased revenues, a solid loan and deposit balance, and higher rates support M&T Bank's (MTB) Q1 earnings, while higher provisions and expenses pose as undermining factors.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) came out with quarterly earnings of $4.09 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.98 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.73 per share a year ago.

title: Charles Schwab Stock Rises After Earnings Beat, Pauses Buybacks; M&T Rallies, State Street Dives
text: Charles Schwab stock rose early Monday after it beat Q1 earnings estimates. M&T Bank, State Street report results following March bank panic.

title: M&T BANK CORPORATION ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER RESULTS
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , April 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE: MTB) today reported its results of operations for the quarter ended March 31, 2023.

title: 10 Banks Are Raking It In As Their Profits Soar, Analysts Say
text: What banking crisis? For some banks, profits are booming.

title: M&T Bank Looks Like A Relative Safe Haven In A Very Nervous Market
text: M&T Bank has a stronger deposit franchise than many of its peers, with less reliance on large uninsured deposits, more "Main Street" depositors, and lower than average deposit costs. Credit quality in the CRE portfolio is likely to be a key watch item given M&T's above-average exposure, and particularly so in the office portfolio.

title: Banks Are On Sale But Risks Remain
text: One month ago, Silicon Valley Bank failed, with a resulting decline across the diversified banking industry. Some investors may be tempted to buy the dip, while others are considering doubling down on losing positions.

title: 5 Bank Stocks That Can Navigate the Challenging Deposit Environment Right Now
text: Fears over the banking crisis and customers' ability to earn more yield on safer assets have made retaining deposits very difficult for banks. Banks that lose lots of deposits will see their earnings struggle.

title: M&T Bank Launches Second Annual Multicultural Small Business Lab for Greater Harrisburg Entrepreneurs
text: Seven-week business accelerator program to be held at Harrisburg University, beginning May 10 HARRISBURG, Pa. , April 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) is seeking as many as 50 entrepreneurs to participate in its second annual Capital Region Multicultural Small Business Lab – a program designed to provide multicultural business owners with the guidance and skills needed to build strong businesses, spur economic growth in the Harrisburg area and build generational wealth for their families.

title: M&T Bank: Conservative Bank's Valuation At GFC And COVID Lows
text: Regional banks have been crushed by the Silicon Valley Bank fallout. M&T Bank is one of the safer choices in this space, and valuations are reasonable.

title: M&T Bank: Banking Concerns
text: M&T Bank has been pressured by the same issues as the sector at large. Considered a regional bank, the company will likely see a bit more deposit outflows here as well.
